name: antibodyProfileByOrganismAndTarget
description: "Get comprehensive antibody profile filtered by organism and target, including HC/LC chains, dose-response curves, and all assay data."

name: assaysByOrganism
description: "Find biologics assays for a specified organism."

name: ADCsWithCapsazeActivityHigherThan
description: "Find biologics ADCs with caspase activity higher than a specified value."

meta.searchPattern: "biologics ADCs with caspase activity higher than ${minActivity}"

name: ADCsWithIC50HLThan
description: "Find biologics ADCs with IC50 higher or lower than a specified value. Use 'higher' or 'lower' for valueTarget to indicate the comparison direction."

name: adcsLinkedToDrug
description: "Find ADCs in biologics database linked to a specified drug identifier."

name: getBiologicsPeptideHelmByIdentifier
description: "Retrieve the HELM sequence of a biologics peptide given its identifier that should follow the pattern GROKPEP-######."

name: getBiologicsCurveByAssayResultIdentifier
description: "Retrieve the dose-response curve JSON for a biologics assay curve identifier (GROKCRV-######)."

name: compound activity details for @target
description: Retrieves compound activity details including assay descriptions, standard measurements, and publication references for a specified ChEMBL target.

id: query:Chembl:_bioactivity data for bacterial targets for @organism
name: _bioactivity data for bacterial targets for @organism
description: Retrieves bioactivity data for compounds tested against bacterial targets of a specified organism.

extras.friendly_name: Browse | Bioactivity for bacterial targets for @organism

name: _cbAllChemblStructures
description: Returns a limited set of all ChEMBL compound structures with canonical SMILES and molregno identifiers.

name: _cbFindByMolregno
description: Retrieves detailed compound information by molregno including structure, names, properties, and synonyms.

name: _cbChemblBrowserQuery
description: Searches ChEMBL compounds by multiple filters including substructure, molecule type, name, max phase, and Lipinski violations.

name: patternSimilaritySearch
description: Searches ChEMBL compounds by molecular fingerprint similarity to a given pattern using Tanimoto coefficient.

name: patternSimilaritySearchWithThreshold
description: Search for a given pattern in the ChEMBL database with a specified threshold of similarity.

name: patternSubstructureSearch
description: Search for a given substructure in the ChEMBL database.

name: ChemblNumberOfStructures
description: Returns a specified number of ChEMBL compound structures with canonical SMILES and molregno identifiers.

extras.friendly_name: Browse | Specified number of ChEMBL structures

name: ChemblMolregNoBySmiles
description: Retrieves the molregno identifier for a compound by its canonical SMILES structure.

name: StructuresByOrganism
description: Retrieves compound structures and bioactivity data for bacterial targets of a specified organism.

name: chemblIdToSmiles
description: Converts a ChEMBL ID to SMILES. CHEMBL IDs are unique identifiers for compounds in the ChEMBL database, for example CHEMBL1234. Not to be confused with molregno, which are unique registration numbers for compounds in the ChEMBL database.

name: molregnoToSmiles
description: Converts a CHEMBL molregno to SMILES. Molregno is a unique registration number for compounds in the ChEMBL database, for example 1234. Not to be confused with ChEMBL IDs, which are unique identifiers for compounds in the ChEMBL database.

name: nameToSmiles
description: Converts a compound name in chembl database to SMILES. For example aspirin or ibuprofen.

name: namesToSmiles
description: Converts a list of compound names in chembl database to SMILES.

name: inchiKeyToChembl
description: Converts InChI Keys to ChEMBL identifiers using a dataframe input.

name: inchiKeyToSmiles
description: Converts InChI Keys to canonical SMILES using a dataframe input.

name: inchiKeyToInchi
description: Converts InChI Keys to standard InChI strings using a dataframe input.

name: chemblToSmiles
description: Converts a dataframe with ChEMBL IDs to SMILES.

name: chemblToInchi
description: Converts a dataframe with ChEMBL IDs to Inchi.

name: chemblToInchiKey
description: Converts a dataframe with ChEMBL IDs to Inchi Keys.

id: query:Chembl:_PK data from 'Curated Drug Pharmacokinetic Data' source for @drug
name: _PK data from 'Curated Drug Pharmacokinetic Data' source for @drug
description: Retrieves pharmacokinetic data including dosage, route, regimen, and measured parameters for a specified drug from curated sources.

name: _protein classification
description: Returns the complete protein classification hierarchy with preferred names and definitions.

id: query:Chembl:_compounds which are selective to one target over a second target
name: _compounds which are selective to one target over a second target
description: Identifies compounds with selective activity, showing high potency for one target and low potency for another target.

extras.friendly_name: Browse | Compounds selective to one target over a second target

id: query:Chembl:compound activity details for all targets containing @protein
name: compound activity details for all targets containing @protein
description: Retrieves compound bioactivity data for all targets containing a specified protein accession identifier.

extras.friendly_name: Browse | Compound activity details for all targets containing @protein

name: unichemUnitTestQuery
description: Test query for Unichem database connectivity and data availability.

name: FracClassification
description: Searches compound structures by FRAC (Fungicide Resistance Action Committee) classification hierarchy levels.

options.nullable: true; choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT level2_description FROM frac_classification where level1_description = @level1")
true; choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT level3_description FROM frac_classification where level2_description = @level2")
true; choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT level4_description FROM frac_classification where level3_description = @level3")

name: QueryBySubstructure
description: Complex search combining molecular similarity, drug mechanism action type, and company research location.

extras.friendly_name: Search | By substructure, country and action type

options.choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT mechanism_of_action from drug_mechanism where action_type = @actionType")

inputs.raw: list<string> company = ['GlaxoSmithKline'] {choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT company from research_companies where country = @country")}

name: ByChemblIds
description: Retrieves molecule dictionary information for a list of ChEMBL identifiers.

name: MolregnoInfo
description: Retrieves compound SMILES and research company country information for a given molregno identifier.

name: ChemblInfo
description: Retrieves compound SMILES and research company country information for a given ChEMBL identifier.

name: FracClassificationWithSubstructure
description: Combines FRAC classification hierarchy search with molecular substructure matching.

extras.friendly_name: Search | FRAC classification with substructure search

options.nullable: true; choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT level2_description FROM frac_classification where level1_description = @level1")
true; choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT level3_description FROM frac_classification where level2_description = @level2")
true; choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT level4_description FROM frac_classification where level3_description = @level3")

name: _compoundNames
description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for compound names matching a substring pattern.

name: _organisms
description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for organism names matching a substring pattern.

name: _proteinTypes
description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for protein classification short names matching a substring pattern.

name: _targetTypes
description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for target types matching a substring pattern.

name: _assayTypes
description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for assay types matching a substring pattern.

name: _relationshipTypes
description: Provides autocomplete suggestions for relationship types matching a substring pattern.

name: acquireCampaignLock
description: Acquire a lock for a campaign. If the lock is expired, it will be removed and a new lock will be created.

name: releaseCampaignLock
description: Release a lock for a campaign.

name: getLastModified
description: Get the last modified time of a campaign lock release (same as save).

name: addMolecule
description: Add a molecule to the dictionary. Returns VID for new or existing molecule.

name: addMolecules
description: Add multiple molecules to the dictionary. Returns VIDs for new or existing molecules.

name: getMoleculeByVid
description: Get a molecule's canonical SMILES by its VID.

name: getCampaignsByVid
description: Get all campaigns and creators for a given VID.

options.choices: Query("SELECT DISTINCT shipcity FROM orders WHERE shipCountry = @shipCountry")
Query("SELECT DISTINCT customerid FROM orders WHERE shipCity = @shipCity")
Query("SELECT DISTINCT lastName FROM employees INNER JOIN orders ON employees.employeeId = orders.employeeId WHERE customerId = @customerId")

options.nullable: true; choices:  Query("select distinct batch_name from test_runs where stress_test and NOT batch_name = '' order by 1  desc")

extras.friendly_name: UA | Tests |  Last Builds Benchmarks Compare
